title: Home | Your Business
description: A business-site starter homepage focused on services, trust, and clear next steps.
heroTitle: Make the offer clear before asking for trust
heroText: Use this homepage to explain what the business does, who it helps, and why someone should keep reading instead of bouncing.

cards.title: Services and offers
cards.text: Use clear cards here for each service line, support area, or business capability.

cards.title: Use cases and industries
cards.text: Show where the offer works best so visitors can place themselves quickly.

cards.title: Trust and delivery
cards.text: Use this space for process confidence, case-study proof, or a concise explanation of how work gets done.
